title: NovaSky
description: A vibrant cosmic sky overlay featuring glowing stars and a deep galactic atmosphere.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fb90b22b07dc00c68b1cdb5f93441211bccc9e4.jpeg)

**NovaSky** a powerful night experience with glowing star fields and a dynamic space feel.
Its strong contrast and luminous details make nighttime visually striking while keeping gameplay clean and readable.

It layers seamlessly over the default sky and works with almost any resource pack.

### 🌌 Features

- Custom space sky
- Mars as the main celestial body
- Earth visible in the background
- Designed to stay readable during gameplay

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky: ON
- Stars: ON
- Sun & Moon: ON
